1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: While not wearing armor or wielding a shield, AC = 10 + DEX mod + WIS mod.

1.name: Martial Arts
1.description: Use DEX instead of STR for unarmed/monk weapon attacks. Roll martial arts die (d4→d10 by level) instead of normal damage. Bonus unarmed strike after Attack action.

2.name: Ki
2.description: Ki points = Monk level, restore on short or long rest. Spend to: Flurry of Blows (2 bonus unarmed strikes), Patient Defense (bonus Dodge), Step of the Wind (bonus Disengage/Dash, double jump distance).

2.name: Unarmored Movement
2.description: Speed increases by 10 ft while not wearing armor. Increases further as you level. At level 9, move across vertical surfaces and liquids on your turn.

3.name: Monastic Tradition
3.description: Choose a subclass: Way of the Open Hand, Shadow, Four Elements, Kensei, Sun Soul, Mercy, Astral Self, Long Death, or others.

3.name: Deflect Missiles
3.description: Reaction when hit by a ranged weapon: reduce damage by 1d10 + DEX mod + Monk level. If reduced to 0, catch and throw it back (uses 1 ki).

4.name: Slow Fall
4.description: Reaction: reduce falling damage by 5 × Monk level.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

5.name: Stunning Strike
5.description: Spend 1 ki when you hit with a melee weapon. Target makes CON save (DC = 8 + prof + WIS mod) or is stunned until end of your next turn.

6.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
6.description: Unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance.

7.name: Evasion
7.description: DEX saves vs area effects: success = no damage, failure = half damage.

7.name: Stillness of Mind
7.description: Action: end one effect causing you to be charmed or frightened.

14.name: Diamond Soul
14.description: Proficiency in all saving throws. Spend 1 ki to reroll a failed saving throw.

18.name: Empty Body
18.description: Spend 4 ki: invisible for 1 minute, resistance to all damage except force. Spend 8 ki: cast Astral Projection without material components.

20.name: Perfect Self
20.description: When you roll initiative with no ki points remaining, regain 4 ki points.
